summary: Tested Channel Drafts v1 for Growth Engine. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The generate-drafts endpoint, drafts storage, and UI components all work correctly.

test_classes: TestGenerateDraftsAuth (1 test) - POST /api/growth/generate-drafts without auth returns 401
TestGenerateDraftsValidation (2 tests) - Invalid page_id returns 400/404, invalid persona_id returns 404
TestGenerateDraftsSuccess (4 tests) - Valid page_id returns 200 with drafts, social_post/search_ad/email structure verified
TestGenerateDraftsWithPersona (1 test) - Generate drafts with persona_id works
TestDraftsPersistence (1 test) - Drafts stored on growth_pages document
TestExistingFunctionality (3 tests) - Pages list, personas list, trends list all still work

features_tested.feature: Generate Drafts button visible next to Analyze SEO
Marketing Drafts section appears after generation
Social Post card visible with headline/body/cta
Search Ad card visible with headline_1/headline_2/description
Copy buttons work (12 copy buttons found)

seed_data_creation: Used existing pages with analysis from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel Drafts v1 fully tested. The POST /api/growth/generate-drafts endpoint generates marketing drafts (social_post, search_ad, email) using GPT-4o. Drafts are stored on growth_pages document. Frontend has Generate Drafts button next to Analyze SEO, shows loading state, and displays Marketing Drafts section with 3 cards (Social Post, Search Ad, Email) each with copy buttons. All existing functionality (crawl, analyze, personas, trends) still works. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_channel_drafts.py
